description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, dark gray roof and a mix of white and light wood exterior finishes. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows and a balcony with a metal railing above the main entrance. The house includes a driveway leading to a parked white car, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The windows are generously sized and asymmetrically arranged, providing ample natural light to the interior. The upper story is partially cantilevered, creating a visually dynamic structure with clean, geometric lines. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and wood exterior finishes, featuring a balcony and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, balcony, and driveway with a parked car.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the balcony, metal railings, and a smaller window arrangement.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the wood-paneled facade, large windows, and the full length of the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cantilevered upper story, balcony, and a large window on the lower level.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, and balcony above, featuring clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
